title: Isolation and characterisation of cobalt(II)-reduced glutathione complex
author: Kalyan K. Mukherjea
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Jadavpur University, Kolkata-700 032, India 
 E-mail : k_mukherjea@yahoo.com                    Fax : 91-33-24146584 
 Manuscript received 3 November 2003, accepted 29 April 2005  

 The cobalt(II)·glutathione complex has been synthesized in the aqueous medium and its composition has been determined by elemental and thermogravimetric analysis. Binding modes have been determined by IR and  1 H NMR spectroscopy and electronic spectral studies. The complex has a square-planar geometry.
